declarations.name: HasSlotController

members.name: test
members.description: Test whether a slot has content. Use `"[default]"` for the default slot.

declarations.description: Root ordered transcript container for message-first AI conversations.
declarations.name: AiConversation

cssProperties.description: Vertical gap between direct child records. Default: var(--ai-space-lg)
cssProperties.name: --ai-conversation-gap

cssProperties.description: Optional visual marker for live conversations. Default: transparent
cssProperties.name: --ai-conversation-live-border-color

slots.description: Ordered records: ai-message, ai-tool-call, ai-tool-result, ai-thinking, ai-event, or native elements.

members.name: density
members.description: Spacing density for transcript rows. Invalid values fall back to comfortable.

members.name: live
members.description: Whether this is a live/streaming region. Adds aria-live="polite" by default.

members.name: label
members.description: Accessible label for the conversation region.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: Spacing density for transcript rows. Invalid values fall back to comfortable.

attributes.name: live
attributes.description: Whether this is a live/streaming region. Adds aria-live="polite" by default.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the conversation region.

declarations.description:
Non-message, non-operation transcript event.

Represents status changes, model switches, checkpoints, notes,
system messages, errors, or custom events within an AI transcript.
declarations.name: AiEvent

cssProperties.description: Divider rule color. Default: subtle muted text color
cssProperties.name: --ai-event-rule-color

cssProperties.description: Divider rule color when expanded. Default: stronger muted text color
cssProperties.name: --ai-event-open-rule-color

cssProperties.description: Meta slot text color. Default: var(--ai-color-text-muted)
cssProperties.name: --ai-event-meta-color

members.name: htmlFor
members.description: ID of the element this event pertains to (maps to `for` attribute).

members.name: open
members.description: Whether the event details are expanded.

members.name: toggle
members.description: Toggle open state. Optionally force open/closed.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: ID of the element this event pertains to (maps to `for` attribute).

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the event details are expanded.

declarations.description: Message-first transcript record with role-specific pi-ui presentation.
declarations.name: AiMessage

cssProperties.description: Optional message border color. Default: transparent
cssProperties.name: --ai-message-border-color

cssProperties.description: Gap between slotted content blocks. Default: var(--spacing-xs)
cssProperties.name: --ai-message-gap

cssProperties.description: User bubble max width. Default: min(90%, 640px)
cssProperties.name: --ai-message-user-max-width

slots.description: Content blocks, usually ai-markdown, ai-thinking, ai-tool-call, ai-tool-result, or ai-event.
Timestamp, model, or other metadata. Prefer native <time>.
slots.name: meta

members.name: role
members.description: Message author/source role. Unknown values render as system-style rows.

members.name: htmlFor
members.description: Optional associated record id; maps to native `for` attribute.

members.name: timestamp
members.description: ISO-ish timestamp for metadata/association; visual formatting is left to slotted meta.

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: Message author/source role. Unknown values render as system-style rows.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: Optional associated record id; maps to native `for` attribute.

attributes.name: timestamp
attributes.description: ISO-ish timestamp for metadata/association; visual formatting is left to slotted meta.

declarations.description: Specialized assistant content block for model reasoning.
declarations.name: AiThinking

slots.description: Thinking content if content property is not set.

members.name: content
members.description: Thinking text to render. Prefer property binding for streaming content.

members.name: redacted
members.description: Thinking exists but is not available.

members.name: headline
members.description: Optional summary headline. Defaults to a first-sentence summary of content.

events.name: ai-show
events.description: Emitted when disclosure opens. Bubbles, composed.

events.name: ai-hide
events.description: Emitted when disclosure closes. Bubbles, composed.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Thinking text to render. Prefer property binding for streaming content.

attributes.name: redacted
attributes.description: Thinking exists but is not available.

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: Optional summary headline. Defaults to a first-sentence summary of content.

declarations.description: Specialized assistant content block for a tool call.
declarations.name: AiToolCall

events.description: Emitted when disclosure opens. Bubbles, composed.
events.name: ai-show

events.description: Emitted when disclosure closes. Bubbles, composed.
events.name: ai-hide

slots.description: Output content. If absent and content is set, renders normalized output in <pre>.

members.name: htmlFor
members.description: Associated ai-tool-call[id]. Missing/mismatched ids are allowed.

members.name: content
members.description: Raw output content. Prefer property binding for large content.

members.name: truncated
members.description: Whether the rendered output was truncated upstream.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: Associated ai-tool-call[id]. Missing/mismatched ids are allowed.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Raw output content. Prefer property binding for large content.

attributes.name: truncated
attributes.description: Whether the rendered output was truncated upstream.

members.name: src
members.description: Image source URL. When set, renders an .

members.name: name
members.description: Display name. Used for initials fallback and img alt text.

type.text: { bg: string; text: string; border: string }

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Image source URL. When set, renders an .

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Display name. Used for initials fallback and img alt text.

members.name: dot
members.description: Whether to show a leading dot indicator.

type.text: { bg: string; text: string; border: string }

attributes.name: dot
attributes.description: Whether to show a leading dot indicator.

declarations.description: Markdown content renderer. Parses and renders markdown source.
declarations.name: AiMarkdown

slots.description: Fallback content if content property is empty.

members.name: content
members.description: Markdown content to render. Does NOT reflect (large content).

members.name: tone
members.description: Visual tone for prose style parity with pi-ui messages.

members.name: trusted
members.description: Whether the content is trusted (affects link behavior).

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Markdown content to render. Does NOT reflect (large content).

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description: Visual tone for prose style parity with pi-ui messages.

attributes.name: trusted
attributes.description: Whether the content is trusted (affects link behavior).

members.name: inline
members.description: Whether to use inline-flex instead of flex.

attributes.name: inline
attributes.description: Whether to use inline-flex instead of flex.

cssProperties.description: Focus ring for slotted/native focus styling.
cssProperties.name: --focus-ring

type.text: { bg: string; text: string; border: string }
